comment: External Claude Code marketplaces + recommended plugins. Re-run install script to sync new marketplace entries.

recommended_plugins.name: clangd-lsp
recommended_plugins.description: C/C++ LSP -- requires clangd installed (winget install LLVM.LLVM)

recommended_plugins.name: pyright-lsp
recommended_plugins.description: Python LSP type checking -- requires: npm install -g pyright

recommended_plugins.name: code-review
recommended_plugins.description: Automated PR review via /code-review -- multi-agent with confidence scoring

recommended_plugins.name: hookify
recommended_plugins.description: Create hooks from markdown files without editing JSON

recommended_plugins.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
recommended_plugins.description: Chrome DevTools MCP -- browser automation, performance traces, a11y, network inspection
